summary: Carrier-only review allows APP-265 current pointer retire after PR #269 merged. This review covers Loom carrier synchronization only and does not claim App #14 user-story completion, real Xiaohongshu/BOSS execution, real account/profile/Cookie use, production page actions, submit/publish/send, hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, or risk-control bypass.

Scope: App-side Core submit/poll contract only; no real Xiaohongshu/BOSS login, browser profile, Cookie, production page action, submit, publish, send, hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, or risk-control bypass occurred. `CODEX_EXPORT_GH_TOKEN=1 loom closeout status --target . --item APP-265 --issue 265 --pr 269 --branch main --head-sha 01db027489ddac931d12056b6f1b86dc29510a9b --owner WebEnvoy --repo App --skip-metadata --json` read back host facts and remains blocked because App #265 is still open and blocked by Core #243 and Harbor #218; this retire carrier preserves the merged fact and returns the shared pointer to idle without closing App #265 or App #14.
